title: ferray-random: standard_normal_parallel is sequential — parallelism is not implemented
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

standard_normal_parallel() in parallel.rs has a comment: 'we generate sequentially with the same state' and 'True parallelism with identical output requires that the sequential and parallel paths consume the BitGenerator state identically.' The function generates all values sequentially. The spawn() method exists and works (jump-ahead for Xoshiro, stream IDs for Philox), but is never used by standard_normal_parallel itself. Either implement actual parallel generation using spawn+chunk, or rename the function to not claim parallelism.
